title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform stability improvements that ensure more reliable Salesforce deployments and automation workflows. We enhanced Salesforce deployment validation to better detect configuration issues and improved the overall reliability of platform updates and integrations.

entries.headline: Platform updates now include latest marketplace features
Better Salesforce deployment validation and error detection
details: Automatically detects State and Country field configuration issues that could break workflows
Improved deployment validation checks prevent common setup problems
Enhanced error recovery for more reliable deployments
